startPoint.en: Talk to Unferth in his house in Burthorpe.
startPoint.es: Habla con Unferth en su casa en Burthorpe.

items.name: Cat
items.display: Cat, hellcat, wily cat, or kitten (if a kitten, advised to bring food for it)

items.name: Catspeak amulet
items.display: Catspeak amulet (a cramulet cannot be used as a substitute)

items.name: Logs
items.display: Logs (can be obtained south of Unferth's house)

items.name: Potato seed
items.display: Four potato seeds (can be obtained south-west of Unferth's house from Head Farmer Jones)

items.name: Vial of water
items.display: Vial of water (as it will dry up in the desert, it is recommended to take this after you are finished with that part of the quest.)

children.name: Vial
children.display: A vial is more reliable. There is a sink right where you need the vial of water.

items.name: Desert robe outfit (white)
items.display: White desert robe outfit, druid's robe outfit, or other white-coloured robes

recommended.name: Enchanted water tiara
recommended.display: An enchanted water tiara or waterskins or completion of Crocodile tears

recommended.name: Varrock Teleport
recommended.display: Varrock Teleport or a combat bracelet

recommended.name: Pharaoh's sceptre
recommended.display: A pharaoh's sceptre, sceptre of the gods, or Sophanem Slayer Dungeon teleport for quick teleport to Sophanem.

children.name: Desert amulet 2
children.display: A desert amulet 2 or a player-owned house in Pollnivneach also gives close access to a magic carpet.

children.name: Contact!
children.display: Completion of Contact! also allows one-way travel across the bridge from Menaphos to Sophanem, which is only a short distance from the Menaphos lodestone.

recommended.name: Lodestone Network
recommended.display: Active lodestones or teleportation across the free-to-play map in order to find Bob the Cat.

children.skill: Antique lamp (A Tail of Two Cats)
children.display: 2 antique lamps, which grant 2,500 experience each in a skill above level 30

rewards.name: Catspeak amulet (e)
rewards.display: Catspeak amulet (e), which allows you to locate Bob.

rewards.name: Doctor's hat
rewards.display: Doctor's hat or nurse hat (you can switch by destroying your hat and requesting a new one from the Apothecary)

rewards.name: Historian Minas
rewards.display: You can talk to Historian Minas in the Varrock Museum to receive 5 kudos.

text.en: catspeak amulet
Equip your catspeak amulet, have your pet cat with you, and talk to Unferth. His house is in eastern Burthorpe, south of Dunstan and east of Tam McGrubor.
text.es: Equípate el catspeak amulet, lleva contigo a tu gato de mascota y habla con Unferth. Su casa está en el este de Burthorpe, al sur de Dunstan y al este de Tam McGrubor.

text.en: 5 death runes

steps.caption: The highlighted area indicates Bob's [[wander radius

text.en: Speak to Hild in the building north of the Heroes' Guild. She will enchant the catspeak amulet for 5 death runes.
text.es: Habla con Hild en el edificio al norte del Heroes' Guild. Ella encantará el catspeak amulet a cambio de 5 death runes.

text.en: Locate Bob the Cat using the catspeak amulet.
text.es: Localiza a Bob the Cat usando el catspeak amulet.

text.en: Right-click and "open" the amulet.
text.es: Haz clic derecho y selecciona "open" en el amulet.

text.en: Click on the whiskers until the arrow and the eyes glow white.
text.es: Haz clic en los bigotes hasta que la flecha y los ojos brillen en blanco.

text.en: Run in the direction of the arrow, occasionally re-checking the amulet, until you find Bob.
text.es: Corre en la dirección de la flecha, comprobando el amulet de vez en cuando, hasta que encuentres a Bob.

text.en: The easiest way to find Bob is to keep hopping worlds in the Carwen Essencebinder Magical Runes Shop in Burthorpe.
text.es: La forma más fácil de encontrar a Bob es ir cambiando de mundo en la Carwen Essencebinder Magical Runes Shop en Burthorpe.

text.en: Talk to Bob.
text.es: Habla con Bob.

text.en: Ask Gertrude about Bob's parents in her house west of Varrock.
text.es: Pregúntale a Gertrude sobre los padres de Bob en su casa al oeste de Varrock.

text.en: If Rat Catchers hasn't been started.
text.es: Si no has empezado Rat Catchers.

text.en: Speak to Reldo in the Varrock library.
text.es: Habla con Reldo en la biblioteca de Varrock.

text.en: Go back and talk to Bob the cat again, in the same spot you found him.
text.es: Vuelve y habla de nuevo con Bob the cat, en el mismo lugar donde lo encontraste.

text.en: 4 potato seeds, logs, chocolate cake, bucket of milk
Go to Sophanem and talk to the Sphinx.
text.es: Ve a Sophanem y habla con la Sphinx.

chatOptions: 2 Skip the cutscene and view summary.

text.en: Talk to Raetul and buy a full desert robe set, if you don't have them already.
text.es: Habla con Raetul y compra un juego completo de desert robe, si no lo tienes ya.

text.en: Return to Unferth's house in Burthorpe and do the following:
text.es: Vuelve a la casa de Unferth en Burthorpe y haz lo siguiente:

text.en: Rake the patch behind his house and plant potato seeds in it. Your cat will notify you when they are done (typically 25–35 minutes to grow). A supreme growth potion from player-owned farm cannot be used to accelerate growth. It will not get disease, and it does not need composting or watering.
text.es: Rastrilla el parcela detrás de su casa y planta potato seeds en ella. Tu gato te avisará cuando estén listas (normalmente tardan entre 25 y 35 minutos en crecer). No se puede usar una supreme growth potion de una granja propia del jugador para acelerar el crecimiento. No contraerá enfermedades y no necesita abono ni riego.

text.en: If you don't have your cat out, chatbox will tell "Perhaps I should have a look and see if Unferth's potatoes have grown...".
text.es: Si no tienes fuera a tu gato, en el cuadro de chat aparecerá "Perhaps I should have a look and see if Unferth's potatoes have grown...".

text.en: Use the logs on fireplace, then light the fireplace.
text.es: Usa los logs en la chimenea y luego enciéndela.

text.en: Use the chocolate cake and bucket of milk on the table.
text.es: Usa el chocolate cake y el bucket of milk sobre la mesa.

text.en: Make his bed upstairs.
text.es: Hazle la cama arriba.

text.en: Give Unferth a haircut.
text.es: Corta el pelo a Unferth.

text.en: Talk to Unferth once all the chores are done.
text.es: Habla con Unferth una vez que hayas terminado todas las tareas.

text.en: vial of water, desert robe outfit, druid's robe outfit or other white robes
Talk to the Apothecary in south-west Varrock.
text.es: Habla con el Apothecary en el suroeste de Varrock.

chatOptions: 1 Tell the Apothecary that Unferth is ill.

text.en: Unequip your weapons and equip the doctors hat/nurse hat and your white robes.
text.es: Quítate las armas y equípate el doctors hat/nurse hat junto con tus white robes.

text.en: Return to Unferth with a vial of water.
text.es: Vuelve con Unferth con un vial of water.

text.en: Talk to Bob the cat. If he's not at his previous location, locate him again using the catspeak amulet (e).
text.es: Habla con Bob the cat. Si no está en su ubicación anterior, localízalo de nuevo usando el catspeak amulet (e).

text.en: After the cutscene, talk to Unferth again.
text.es: Después de la cinemática, habla de nuevo con Unferth.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
